prompt: Write segment 2 (THE VALUE PROPOSITION, Day 1) of the openpatent.ai 10-segment cold-outreach sequence, tuned for the **indie_studio** persona — a 2–12 person game studio with multiple parallel builds (engine, art, narrative). The email must (a) be ≤150 words in the body (excluding signature footer), (b) contrast the old 'provisional in 3–6 weeks' path with the new '6-layer OTS in 9 minutes' path, (c) explicitly mention all 6 layers (title, description, drawings, prototype reference, contributor hash, chain receipt), (d) mention Bitcoin OP_RETURN anchoring, (e) pitch the Atelier tier ($99/mo) as the right fit for a 4-person studio shipping weekly, and reference the OTS Self-Serve tier ($10) for the one-off case. Use builder-to-builder tone. No 'synergy', no 'Web3', no emojis. The email must end with this exact signature: 'The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets.' Return ONLY the email as plain text. Do not include the unsubscribe footer (it is added automatically).
